package rulecoverage

func NegativeMiddlewareWritesBusinessResponsePayloads() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_writes_business_response_payloads"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Middleware that emits domain success payloads instead of leaving response bodies to handlers or render helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
